caption: In a studio setting with a wall of framed photos and clothing racks in the background, a man wears a tall, grey, peaked wig, glasses, over-ear headphones, a white button-down shirt, brown suspenders, and a red bow tie. He sits behind a professional microphone and gestures with his hands as he speaks. To the left of the man, a logo reads "THE STUDIO PODCAST," and to the right, text says "GOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, speaking and moving his hands in a conversational manner. His expression remains focused and serious as his head tilts slightly and his hands shift positions to emphasize his speech. The background remains static, featuring a "LEE" brand sign and various merchandise on hangers.
